title: Audit Record
description: An immutable record of a governance decision or lifecycle transition.

id.description: Unique identifier for this audit record.

run_id.description: Run identifier this audit record belongs to.

constraints_id.description: Constraints document identifier for this run.

candidate_solution_ids.description: Candidate solution identifiers included in this audit record.

evaluation_result_ids.description: Evaluation result identifiers included in this audit record.

governance_result_ids.description: Governance result identifiers included in this audit record.

promotion_decision_ids.description: Promotion decision identifiers included in this audit record.

final_status.description: Final run status: PASS, FAIL, BLOCKED, or UNKNOWN.
